### Disclaimer

All information provided in the mandatory disclosure is accurate to the best of our knowledge as of the date mentioned. For any clarifications or to verify the authenticity of documents, please contact the college administration or visit the official websites of regulatory bodies.

For grievances regarding mandatory disclosure, please email:[compliance@jerusalemcoe.ac.in](mailto:compliance@jerusalemcoe.ac.in)
